title: Faded Dither 3
description: A warm, gradient background transitioning from pale golden-yellow in the upper left to a deeper, more saturated golden-tan in the lower right. The base is a solid color (#e3b354) with a subtle dithering effect applied using a Bayer 8x8 pattern that creates a fine, grainy texture throughout. The dithering uses transparent and light yellow (#f5d47f) colors to add depth and visual interest. Overlaid on this is a subtle sine wave pattern with white color, positioned in the upper-right quadrant at approximately 72% horizontally and 11% vertically. The sine wave has low amplitude (0.15) and moves at a slow speed (0.4), creating gentle undulating lines at an angle of 204 degrees. The overall effect is a warm, textured, and slightly animated gradient with minimal visual noise, creating a sophisticated and calming aesthetic. The dithering pattern is fine enough to appear as a subtle texture rather than obvious pixelation, while the sine wave adds a delicate, organic movement to the composition.
